NoticeData.Contents: # New Event Dungeon — Bifrost Gate A new limited-time event dungeon has been added. - Two exclusive event materials are introduced for the Bifrost Gate - These materials are used to complete event-exclusive collections that provide meaningful stat boosts to support player progression - Completing all 12 collections requires a combination of dungeon clearing and package purchases # New Runes — PETPOP New Grade 8 (Transcendent) skill runes have been added as part of the NCU collaboration. - Freya PETPOP Rune: A survival-oriented hybrid rune with HP, DEF, and SPD stats, plus an ATK buff skill. Adventure only. # Game Improvements Buff Limit Adjustments The upper limits for several stat buff/debuff skills have been increased to accommodate higher-tier gameplay: Skill Stat Previous Limit New Limit ATK Boost ATK +15,000,000 +150,000,000 ATK Reduction ATK - 15,000,000 - 150,000,000 SPD Boost SPD +15,000,000 +150,000,000 HIT Boost HIT +15,000,000 +200,000,000 HIT Reduction HIT - 15,000,000 - 200,000,000 Synthesis Cost Reduction The number of materials required for equipment synthesis has been reduced across all grades. Lower grades receive a modest reduction, while mid-to-high grades see a more significant decrease. Synthesis Aura Grimoire Costume G1→G2 15 → 13 - - G2→G3 15 → 13 - - G3→G4 15 → 13 10 → 9 20 → 18 G4→G5 15 → 11 15 → 11 20 → 15 G5→G6 16 → 12 16 → 12 20 → 15 G6→G7 12 → 9 12 → 9 15 → 11 G7→G8 10 → 9 10 → 9 12 → 11 Bug Fixes - Fixed an issue where the PC launcher would display a white screen indefinitely when the node status was unstable

Nine Chronicles Hard World Open - Stages 451–470 Release - Content with significantly higher difficulty than existing worlds - To play Hard Mode world content, a Catalyst Potion is required in addition to the existing Action Points - Catalyst Potions can be obtained through Patrol Rewards and Monster Collection rewards - Catalyst Potions can also be obtained as rewards from stage clear quests Transcendent-grade craftable equipment - 10 types in total — 5 Fire-attribute and 5 Water-attribute pieces - Transcendent-grade equipment is designed to grow significantly stronger as it is enhanced. Game Improvement - 5 new collections related to Transcendent equipment and 1 new collection related to a new title have been added. ## Additional Updates - Detailed information regarding the new rune to be added through NCU - PETPOP will be shared in early April. - NCU's second title, Ragnarok Breaker, will be coming to you soon — thank you for your continued patience. - The update for Infinite Tower floors 101 and beyond will be scheduled for April, after we have had the opportunity to review participation numbers and equipment distribution among adventurers engaging with the new Hard Mode world.

## Patrol Reward Event Feb 24, 2026 – Mar 24, 2026 (4 weeks) During the event period, Patrol Rewards will be adjusted so that players can obtain Golden Dust, Ruby Dust, or Emerald Dust based on their level range, with up to 2,000+ obtainable. Log in and claim rewards regularly to experience a variety of summons! ## Transcendent-Grade Summon Equipment Added ▸ 4 New Auras - Transcendent Auras: Ymir, Beast, Aegis, Barrage ▸ 9 New Grimoires - 3 each in Attack / Defense / Function categories (Total 9) ▸ 2 New Runes - Limited-time planet Thor-related Transcendent Runes - Skill Rune: Thor’s Mjölnir Rune - Stat Rune: Ragnarok Rune ▸ 2 New Costumes - Championship commemorative Transcendent costumes: - Odin 26 First Champion - Heimdall 26 First Champion ## Transcendent-Grade Adjustments - Summon Rate Changes - Aura / Grimoire / Rune / Costume summon data updated - Synthesis Changes - Aura / Grimoire / Costume synthesis data updated - Mythic costumes SharkBa2 and TriplexMazi can no longer be obtained via synthesis ## Game Improvements - Added new Collections related to Transcendent equipment - Added Mythic-grade Hammer
